title: SEO Content Outline Generator
problem: Generating SEO content outlines manually was eating 10–15 hours of work every week. I built an automated pipeline that produces structured, ready-to-use content outlines in a fraction of the time.
result: 10–15 hrs of weekly work reduced to 1–2 hrs.

title: SEO Content Refresh Tool
problem: Refreshing and reoptimizing existing content at scale is slow and inconsistent when done manually. I built an AI-powered tool that analyzes and rewrites existing content for better performance — automatically.
result: Content team works faster, at scale, with consistent output quality.

title: Google Ads Monitoring & Alert System
problem: Ad performance issues often go unnoticed until budget is already wasted. I built an automated monitoring system that tracks campaign metrics and sends real-time alerts when something needs attention.
result: Faster response to ad issues. Less wasted spend.

title: Auto Calendar Meeting Scheduler Agent
problem: Coordinating meetings manually — back and forth messages, missed slots, no-shows — was killing productive time. I built an AI agent that handles scheduling end-to-end, automatically confirming and booking meetings without human intervention.
result: Zero manual scheduling. Meetings booked while you sleep.

title: Email Agent with Website Form Integration
problem: Leads coming through a website form were sitting unanswered for hours. I built an automated email agent that picks up form submissions instantly and responds — with the right message, at the right time.
result: Faster lead response. No lead left waiting.

title: Auto Instagram Posting Agent
problem: Manually posting on Instagram every day is inconsistent and time-consuming. I built an agent that auto-schedules and posts content to Instagram — keeping the account active without lifting a finger.
result: Consistent posting. Zero daily manual effort.
